system.powerDescription:
You sculpt flesh like an artisan. Choose a willing creature within range, and elevate one of their following physical features. 

• Speed 
• Strength 
• Sensory Acuity 

Whilst elevated the feature is considered to be at 1/2 CAT in capability and their body will physically morph in some-way to match the gained trait. An elevated feature is still considered to be mundane. 

Gain or grant +1D when next you or an ally take advantage of this power. This power may effect the parameters of a roll whilst active.
